title: SiTime Q1 2021 Earnings - Strong Beat and 26% Share Surge
text: SiTime delivered quarterly earnings of $0.19 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.12 per share, compared to a loss of $0.14 per share a year ago. Shares surged 26% after the strong Q1 earnings report. For the second quarter, the company expected sales to increase 10% to 15% sequentially, reaching about $40 million at midpoint, or 85% higher than Q1 last year. More than half of the company's bookings in Q1 2021 were for deliveries five to 12 months out in the future, providing unprecedented visibility into 2021 revenue. The data center market was described as about a $100 million market opportunity for the company.
